item.description:
Release date: 2026-04-23

Fixed

  • Fixed a release packaging issue that could make the app look damaged after download. NameQuick now ships a relocatable MLX runtime bundle that passes Gatekeeper checks.
  • Fixed website downloads that could return a tiny invalid disk image. Download links now resolve to a valid DMG payload.

Polished

  • Added stricter release validation before publish. The release pipeline now checks MLX runtime symlink safety plus codesign --strict and Gatekeeper assessment on the exported app.
